summary: Verified the Integrations-unification refactor + IMAP addition end-to-end on the public preview URL. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases in test_integrations_unified.py + 3 new cases in test_mail_delivery_paths.py (16/16 total) pass — schema exposes 9 providers with category+description, IMAP save masks password + persists, test endpoint returns graceful ok:false gaierror for unreachable hosts, cPanel/Plesk missing-creds and complete-creds paths, DELETE endpoint (200 {deleted:1} + 404), user-access-catalog no longer contains 'real_integrations' but still has 'integrations', /admin/mail/inbox falls back to seed messages when IMAP disabled or unreachable, /admin/mail/send returns delivered_via='smtp-failed*' when v2 SMTP is enabled+unreachable and 'smtp-mock' or 'queued (SMTP not configured)' when disabled. Frontend: sidebar shows a single 'Integrations' entry (nav-integrations, no Real APIs link); /portal/admin/real-integrations client-side redirects to /portal/admin/integrations; unified page renders heading, 3 mini-stat cards (1/9, 5, 1), and all 5 category groups (Virtualization & Compute, Network, Hosting Provisioning, Payment Gateways, Email (SMTP & IMAP)); all 9 integration-{provider} cards render. IMAP card expands via toggle-imap and exposes imap-host/-port/-username/-password/-opt-use_ssl/-opt-mailbox/-opt-fetch_limit inputs. Fill+Save persists across page reload (host + username survive). Test-connection surfaces 'gaierror: [Errno -2] Name or service not known' as expected. Webmail 'SMTP + IMAP not configured' amber banner shows when both v2 integrations are disabled. Email, Articles, Users, Products, Finance, Provisioning admin pages continue to load without functional errors.

issues:
Pre-existing React hydration warnings: '

cannot be a descendant of

verified_backend.schema: GET /admin/integrations-v2/schema returns 9 providers with category (virtualization/network/provisioning/payment/mail) + description
verified_backend.imap_put_masking: PUT /admin/integrations-v2/imap masks password_masked ending with '**' and clears raw password on subsequent GET
verified_backend.imap_test_unreachable: POST /admin/integrations-v2/imap/test with unreachable host returns 200 {ok:false, message: gaierror ...}
verified_backend.smtp_test_wired: POST /admin/integrations-v2/smtp/test no longer returns 'No test method'; returns ok:false gracefully against smtp.example.com
verified_backend.cpanel_plesk_validation: cPanel empty creds → ok:false with 'Missing/credentials' in message; host+user+api_token → ok:true. Plesk same with password.
verified_backend.mail_inbox_imap_disabled: Returns mocked seed list, no _live flag
verified_backend.mail_inbox_imap_unreachable: Gracefully returns 200 list (no crash) when IMAP configured but host unreachable
verified_backend.mail_send_paths: delivered_via='smtp-failed:...' when v2 SMTP enabled+unreachable; 'smtp-mock' or 'queued (SMTP not configured)' when disabled

verified_frontend.sidebar: One 'Integrations' link (data-testid=nav-integrations, href=/portal/admin/integrations); no 'Real APIs' link exists anywhere in nav
verified_frontend.unified_page: H1 'Integrations', mini-stats '1 / 9 configured', '5 categories', '1 legacy module', 'Legacy integrations detected' banner. Category groups Virtualization & Compute / Network / Hosting Provisioning / Payment Gateways / Email (SMTP & IMAP) all render.
verified_frontend.imap_ui_flow: toggle-imap expands the card; imap-host/-port/-username/-password/-opt-use_ssl/-opt-mailbox/-opt-fetch_limit all present. Save persists (host='imap.testcase.example.com' + username survive reload). Test surfaces gaierror as expected.
verified_frontend.webmail_banner: 'SMTP + IMAP not configured' amber banner shown when both v2 integrations are disabled; disappears once IMAP is enabled (verified in earlier iteration of the run)
verified_frontend.regression_pages: Email Automation, Articles, Users & Clients, Products & Services, Finance, Provisioning all load with proper H1 and no functional errors

(Non-blocking, pre-existing) Investigate the two hydration warnings in the console:

as a descendant of
critical_code_review_comments: Great refactor — the unified AdminIntegrations page cleanly groups providers by category and surfaces a legacy-migration hint pointing the admin to the old integrations collection. Consider adding a 'Delete legacy row' button next to the migration hint so admins can wipe the old module without shell access.
IMAPClient.test_connection() correctly returns ok:false + gaierror message instead of raising — good defensive coding.
portal/routes.py is now approaching 4500+ lines; the domain-split refactor called out in earlier iterations is still pending. Not blocking.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_mail_delivery_paths.py (new — 3 pytest cases covering mail/inbox IMAP fallback + mail/send v2 SMTP failure/queue paths)
seed_data_creation: No permanent seed data. Test data (imap host 'imap.testcase.example.com') was left disabled — safe. Backend pytest fixtures set integrations back to enabled:false at teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Integrations unification is production-ready. IMAP save+test+persist works end-to-end. When adding future integrations, keep the schema pattern (category + description + credentials[] + options[]) — the unified UI groups automatically by category. DO NOT re-introduce a 'Real APIs' menu key — /admin/real-integrations is now a redirect. The two hydration warnings are pre-existing and unrelated.
rca of the issue: N/A — all acceptance criteria satisfied on first pass.
